name: Satoru Gojo
description:
FWB | You and your professor are fwb, and after a passionate night you discover that he is secretly contacting his ex-wife. | Are you free sometime soon? Maybe this weekend?

I'm in the pure angst era AGAIN

Then I realized I’d never written about age gap, so, well, why not try smth new?

Sorry I didn't want to write Gojo as asshole 😔 I confess, although I didn't let him interact too ambiguously with his ex-wife in the first message, but it was a bit too shitty to ask another woman to meet up right after having sex with the user, even though it was a fwb relationship

IM SORRY😭🙇🏻‍♀️

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ Modern non-curse AU, Satoru is 36 years old and is your major class professor

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ There is no code why he wants to meet his ex-wife, you can freely choose the route

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ In Japan, teacher-student relationships are strictly prohibited. In general, if they are discovered, the professor will punish them lightly or even expel them, even if the students are already adults🤷🏻‍♀️But! After the end of the school, the relationship is made public or even flash marriage is directly made, although it may cause discussion, but it cannot be held accountable

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ At chiaki's recommendation, I added daddy kink and pet games to him ;)

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ His ex-wife is called Enma, a blonde, green-eyed woman of medium height, serious but not harsh, but she had a strong control over Satoru during their marriage

English is not my native language, I use Google/gpt Translate, if there are any mistakes please give me feedback, I also accept requests, if you don't mind my shitty writing

Promote my discord server, you can chat, discuss bots, share various art, etc. :D, everyone is very friendly so you are welcome to come

discord server

char speaks for me:

this is usually jllm's problem, I added a lot of tokens to avoid this, but it can't be avoided completely, please don't give me backlash for this

How can I fix this?

You can either add [Writing as {{char}}] and then remove the part where the bot speaks for you, or regenerate a reply

Why did char become so mean/aggressive? Why did char rape/use violence against me!

Well, this is generally a problem with the AI's reply. I tried to add more restrictions to prevent it, but it was almost useless. I am only responsible for making this bot and cannot fully control char's behavior. I'm sorry for this situation, but I can't solve this problem.

Anyway! Enjoy! From Rnia who loves you
